description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named hwsapibot that runs on a workflow call. The workflow uses an ubuntu-latest job with concurrency control, checks out the repository, and performs a series of steps including installing packages, configuring the environment, building and updating various components (HPM hooks, item_db SQL data, mob_db SQL data, and constants documentation), and pushing the changes to the repository. The workflow also collects timing statistics and publishes them to a BuildStats API.
